calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DAY AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR THE MOVING PARTY/APPELLANT/DEFENDANT AMARITA KING OR VANESSA KING; RESPONDENT CAROLYNE CONNOR APPEARS WITH TIMOTHY TONELLA. THE COURT ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PROVIDED BY RESPONDENT CAROLYNE CONNOR AND BY TIMOTHY TONELLA WHO ALSO PROVIDE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE THAT IS READ AND REVIEWED BY THE COURT. AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PROVIDED AND AFTER REVIEWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. RESPONDENT IS NOTIFIED THE COURT'S DECISION WILL BE PREPARED AND SENT VIA U.S. MAIL.

PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT A. MYLES; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).
